name: Google Jules
description: Use for development, writing code, creating features, and pushing branches. Fully autonomous coding agent in a cloud VM. Can push code to branches which can then be tested via GitHub Actions.

tools.name: executor-jules.execute
tools.description: Steering loop: send to Jules, poll, verify, feed back, repeat. Signature: jules.execute({ prompt: string, successCriteria?: string }).

configFields.label: Daily Task Limit
configFields.description: Maximum number of tasks Jules can process per day. Set to 0 for unlimited.

configFields.label: Concurrent Task Limit
configFields.description: Maximum number of tasks Jules can process at the same time.
